transfer_summary.interpretation: Shell-axis behavior transfers unevenly by isotope chain; chain-level regressions remain visible and block broad support wording.

promotion_boundary.required_next_step: Maintainer review before any shell-axis expansion, reveal scoring, RESULT-* artifact, claim, or knowledge update.

limitations: Sandbox-only retrospective audit; no prediction registry, canonical result, claim, or knowledge artifact is updated.
Chains with fewer than three committed rows are diagnostic only.
Best non-shell controls reuse TASK-0317 definitions; no new formula family is fit.
Shell-axis and control coefficients are fit on the 11-row NMD-0002 residual slice.
The full-known surface is committed repository data; this is not a future-measurement reveal.
